content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule in `geomconf_2358.xyz`, I can identify the neighbors of atom index 17 (Oxygen).

1.  **Locate Atom 17**: I see a red sphere labeled "O:17" located towards the center-right of the molecule structure.
2.  **Identify Connections**: Following the covalent bonds (the sticks) connected to atom 17, I can see connections to two other atoms:
    *   One bond connects to an orange sphere labeled "C:16".
    *   The other bond connects to a blue sphere labeled "N:19".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 17 are Carbon (C) at index 16 and Nitrogen (N) at index 19.

The geomconf_index is **2358**.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 17 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
